---
title: "Supporting Data Layer"
---

The toolbox is supported by a broader digital data and visualisation layer that provides contextual information, mapped layers, and comparison services.

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **What it is** | A horizontal service that supports the toolbox with data, layers, and visualisation. |
| **Main purpose** | To place local observations into a broader spatial and analytical context. |
| **Where used** | Digital |
| **Typical users** | Advisors, researchers, environmental professionals, public authorities, advanced users |
| **Typical outputs** | Maps, contextual layers, comparison support, background information |

## Why it matters

Users often need more than one measurement. They also need to know how a site sits within a broader spatial context. The supporting data layer helps with that task.

## Communication note

For end-user communication, it is usually best to present this as a **supporting or horizontal service** that powers part of the toolbox, rather than as the toolbox itself.
